title: Bridge Essay: REBUS and the Anarchic Brain: Toward a Unified Model of the Brain Action of Psychedelics.
concept: Predictive processing — free energy principle, Bayesian brain, active inference, neural causality.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dependent Arising** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Predictive processing — free energy principle, Bayesian brain, active inference, neural causality.

**REBUS and the Anarchic Brain: Toward a Unified Model of the Brain Action of Psychedelics.** - Pharmacol Rev (2019). DOI: 10.1124/pr.118.017160. PMID: 31221820. This paper formulates the action of psychedelics by integrating the free-energy principle and entropic brain hypothesis. We call this formulation relaxed beliefs under psychedelics (REBUS) and the anarchic brain, founded on the principle that-via their entropic effect on spontaneous cortical activity-psychedelics work to relax the precision of high-level priors or beliefs, thereby liberating bottom-up information flow, particularly via intrinsic sources such as the limbic system.
